grain: one row per instrument per contract per as_of_date

columns.name: venue
columns.description: Publishing venue / exchange / clearing source (e.g., SGX, CME, Baltic).

columns.name: instrument_code
columns.description: Instrument identifier used by the source (or your internal canonical code).

columns.name: underlying_code
columns.description: Baltic route/index code where applicable (e.g., C5, TD3C, BCI).

columns.name: contract_type
columns.description: MONTH | QUARTER | CAL (or your chosen taxonomy).

columns.name: contract_start
columns.description: Start date of the contract period.

columns.name: contract_end
columns.description: End date of the contract period.

columns.name: settlement
columns.description: Settlement/mark price for this contract on as_of_date.

columns.name: source_file
columns.description: Optional provenance pointer to raw file name.
